yearNumbers.label: Staggered K Start
yearNumbers.detail: First year HCPS splits pre-K & K into two cohorts — Aug 24 and Aug 25 — before all students join Aug 26.

yearNumbers.label: Diwali Observed
yearNumbers.detail: Student and teacher holiday district-wide — one of few Virginia divisions to observe Diwali.

yearNumbers.label: Yom Kippur Observed
yearNumbers.detail: Student and teacher holiday — school closed for the Jewish High Holiday.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: School holiday the Friday before Spring Break, extending the no-school window to ~10 consecutive days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Henrico County in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The 2026–2027 school year begins August 24, 2026. HCPS introduces a staggered start for incoming pre-K and kindergarten students — half begin August 24, the other half begin August 25, and all students are together starting August 26. Grade 1–5, Grade 6, and Grade 9 students also begin August 24. Grades 7–8 and 10–12 begin August 25.

calendarFaqs.q: What is new in the Henrico County 2026-2027 school calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The 2026–2027 school year introduces a staggered kindergarten and pre-K start for the first time in HCPS — new students join in two cohorts on August 24 and 25 rather than all on the same day. The calendar also includes Yom Kippur (September 21) and Diwali (November 9) as student and teacher holidays. Thanksgiving Break covers November 25–27 only, not the full week.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spring Break for Henrico County in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break in 2026–2027 runs March 29–April 2, 2027. Good Friday (March 26) is observed as a school holiday in HCPS and falls the Friday immediately before Spring Break begins. The combined no-school window — Good Friday, the weekend, and Spring Break week — runs March 26 through April 4, giving students approximately 10 consecutive days off.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Winter Break for Henrico County in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break in 2026–2027 begins December 21, 2026 and ends January 1, 2027. Schools reopen January 4, 2027, following the break.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving Break for Henrico County in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving Break in 2026–2027 covers November 25–27 only — Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday. Monday November 23 and Tuesday November 24 are regular school days. Households planning Thanksgiving travel that requires earlier departure should account for the shorter break window compared to districts that observe the full week.

calendarNotes: Henrico County Public Schools introduces a staggered kindergarten and pre-K start for 2026–2027 — new for HCPS. Half of all incoming pre-K and kindergarten students begin August 24; the remaining new-to-school students join on August 25, with all students together by August 26. Good Friday (March 26) is a school holiday in HCPS, the Friday immediately before Spring Break begins — the combined window from March 26 through April 4 gives students approximately 10 consecutive days off including surrounding weekends. Spring Break itself runs March 29–April 2. Thanksgiving Break covers November 25–27 only; unlike some neighboring Virginia divisions, Henrico does not observe the full Thanksgiving week. Winter Break runs December 21 through January 1. The school year ends June 4, 2027, a student half day marking the close of the fourth quarter.
